title: Lemon Tree Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Lemon Tree Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Lemon Tree Hotels in Dhanbad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Lemon Tree Hotels:
Lemon Tree Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lemon Tree Hotels!
